rootCause: The remote completionist harness did not preflight the repo Node engine contract (>=20 <22), so unsupported Node runtimes could progress into Playwright config loading and fail with a Playwright ESM loader error instead of a harness-level failure. User-visible symptom: `npm run qa:remote-completionist-award-iii -- --baseURL=https://staging.democratized.space` crashed with `Playwright requires Node.js 18.19 or higher` while loading frontend/playwright.config.ts.
resolution: Added a harness-level Node-version preflight in scripts/run-remote-completionist-award-iii.mjs that rejects unsupported versions before Playwright launch, prints a concise harness-prefixed message including current version and required range (>=20 <22), and provides remediation (`nvm use` then `pnpm install`). Added deterministic regression coverage in tests/runRemoteCompletionistAwardIIIResolver.test.ts for unsupported/supported version classification and unsupported-version user-facing messaging.
